info.english_meaning: to praise oneself to desire to tie together to string together to seek to stay together to stand firmly to compile
info.hindI_arTa: yaSa prApta karanA lene kI aBilAzA karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: AtmaKyApanaM tatsADanaM ca pratizWA  labDumicCA lipsA  ekatra sTApanaM sandarBo vA granTaH  tatra - ' Adye akarmakaH itarayoH sakarmakaH' iti mADavIya-DAtuvfttO  ' granTe ca iti pfTak pAWaH viralaprayogArTaH' iti kzIrasvAmI
